key_decisions.original_text: bal-devnet-7 is the final BAL-specific devnet; no bal-devnet-8 planned
key_decisions.context: all future EL work moves to unified Glamsterdam devnet track

key_decisions.original_text: Glamsterdam devnet-6 scope: EIP-8038, EIP-2780 (preliminary values), EIP-8246, EIP-7997 included; EIP-7610 excluded pending Gary's input
Glamsterdam devnet-6 scope: EIP-8038, EIP-2780 (preliminary values), EIP-8246, EIP-7997 included; EIP-7610 excluded pending Gary's input
Engine API: Marius's proposal adopted over Barnabas's; teams that implemented Barnabas's version should migrate
